title: Caldwell's Preliminary Wire Note
description: On the glass surface of the candy display case, Caldwell has left his notepad open for a moment while he moves to a better vantage point. The top of the visible page reads: 'Four A&T students — orderly, no incident — counter refused service, students remain seated — 4:47 PM.' Three words are underlined: 'no incident.' The framing is already set. The story is already being written as a success.
